# Compatibility Matrix (CI-Tested)

This matrix summarizes backend/runtime versions exercised by CI integration suites in this repository. It is intended to be referenced from release notes.

Generated: 2026-02-24 (UTC)

## CI sources

- `.github/workflows/test.yml` (`integration-all` matrix)
- `.github/workflows/soak.yml` (evidence / soak / chaos / flake-repeat)
- `integration/all`, `integration/bus`, `integration/root` (pinned testcontainer images)

## Backends

| Backend | CI-tested version/runtime | Coverage source |
|---|---|---|
| `redis` | `redis:7` | `integration/all,integration/bus,integration/root` |
| `mysql` | `mysql:8.0` | `integration/all,integration/bus,integration/root` |
| `postgres` | `postgres:16` | `integration/all,integration/bus,integration/root` |
| `sqlite` | `n/a (in-process sqlite driver)` | `integration/all,integration/bus,integration/root` |
| `nats` | `nats:2` | `integration/all,integration/bus,integration/root` |
| `sqs` | `localstack/localstack:3.8 (SQS emulator)` | `integration/all,integration/bus,integration/root` |
| `rabbitmq` | `rabbitmq:3 / rabbitmq:3.12-management / rabbitmq:3.13-management` | `integration/all,integration/bus,integration/root` |
| `null` | `n/a (in-process)` | `integration/all` |
| `sync` | `n/a (in-process)` | `integration/all` |
| `workerpool` | `n/a (in-process)` | `integration/all` |

## Notes

- Container-backed backends are pinned by integration test image tags in repo code.
- `sqs` uses LocalStack as an emulator in CI, not AWS-managed SQS.
- RabbitMQ coverage spans multiple pinned images across suites; all listed tags are CI-exercised.
